spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates renderSizeHint in the AudioContext constructor and reports sampleRate + renderQuantumSize, but renderQuantumSize shows 'not exposed' on the test browser — the demo should surface this as expected behavior for non-v152 builds rather than a limitation.

interactive.rationale: Real dropdown (default/hardware/256/512/2048) + button creates a real AudioContext and reports the result in a live status region.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Description promises a probe that uses real constructors and reports unsupported browsers — delivers exactly that.

edge_cases.rationale: Shows the unsupported case but does not test invalid renderSizeHint values or demonstrate error handling.

references.rationale: Links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5078190552907776 directly in the see-also section.

conformance.rationale: Conformance suite created separately at feature level.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Browser-tested via chrome-devtools-mcp on Chrome. Created context with renderSizeHint 'hardware' — status reported sampleRate 48000 and renderQuantumSize 'not exposed'. No console errors.

telemetry_health.rationale: No telemetry events observed; this concept is a probe, not an interactive demo with tracked events.

openQuestions.title: Add error-handling demonstration for invalid renderSizeHint values
openQuestions.detail: The probe shows the happy path. A follow-up concept should demonstrate what happens when renderSizeHint is set to 0, a non-power-of-2, or an unsupported value.
